__inputs.name: DS_NEONDB
__inputs.label: NeonDB
__inputs.description: Your existing NeonDB PostgreSQL data source

targets.rawSql: SELECT PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY (fields->>'total_ms')::bigint) AS value FROM atc_metrics WHERE measurement = 'download_complete' AND $__timeFilter(ts)
SELECT PERCENTILE_CONT(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY (fields->>'total_ms')::bigint) AS value FROM atc_metrics WHERE measurement = 'download_complete' AND $__timeFilter(ts)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM atc_metrics WHERE measurement = 'download_complete' AND $__timeFilter(ts)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM atc_metrics WHERE measurement = 'download_stage' AND fields->>'success' = 'false' AND $__timeFilter(ts)

SELECT tags->>'stage' AS metric, PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY (fields->>'duration_ms')::bigint) AS value FROM atc_metrics WHERE measurement = 'download_stage' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: Download Stage Duration Over Time (median ms)
panels.description: Tracks whether the OurAirports data source CDN is degrading. A rising trend means their hosting is getting slower.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(ts,$__interval), PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY (fields->>'duration_ms')::bigint) AS "Airports" FROM atc_metrics WHERE measurement = 'download_stage' AND tags->>'stage' = 'airports' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(ts,$__interval), PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY (fields->>'duration_ms')::bigint) AS "Frequencies" FROM atc_metrics WHERE measurement = 'download_stage' AND tags->>'stage' = 'frequencies' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(ts,$__interval), PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY (fields->>'duration_ms')::bigint) AS "Runways" FROM atc_metrics WHERE measurement = 'download_stage' AND tags->>'stage' = 'runways' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(ts,$__interval), PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY (fields->>'duration_ms')::bigint) AS "Navaids" FROM atc_metrics WHERE measurement = 'download_stage' AND tags->>'stage' = 'navaids' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Download Stage Statistics — p50 / p95 / p99
panels.description: Useful for spotting which file is the consistent bottleneck.

targets.rawSql: SELECT tags->>'stage' AS "Stage", COUNT(*) AS "Count", ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5)  WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY (fields->>'duration_ms')::bigint)) AS "p50 (ms)", ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY (fields->>'duration_ms')::bigint)) AS "p95 (ms)", ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.99) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY (fields->>'duration_ms')::bigint)) AS "p99 (ms)" FROM atc_metrics WHERE measurement = 'download_stage' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 3 DESC

panels.title: Total Download Time Distribution
panels.description: How many users hit the 1–2 min expectation vs outliers.

targets.rawSql: SELECT CASE WHEN (fields->>'total_ms')::bigint < 30000  THEN '< 30s' WHEN (fields->>'total_ms')::bigint < 60000  THEN '30s–1m' WHEN (fields->>'total_ms')::bigint < 90000  THEN '1m–1.5m' WHEN (fields->>'total_ms')::bigint < 120000 THEN '1.5m–2m' WHEN (fields->>'total_ms')::bigint < 180000 THEN '2m–3m' ELSE '> 3m' END AS "Bucket", COUNT(*) AS "Downloads" FROM atc_metrics WHERE measurement = 'download_complete' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY MIN((fields->>'total_ms')::bigint)

panels.title: Total Download Time Trend (median + p95)
panels.description: Rising trend = OurAirports CDN getting slower or users on worse connections.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(ts,$__interval), PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY (fields->>'total_ms')::bigint) AS "Median" FROM atc_metrics WHERE measurement = 'download_complete' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(ts,$__interval), PERCENTILE_CONT(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY (fields->>'total_ms')::bigint) AS "p95" FROM atc_metrics WHERE measurement = 'download_complete' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
